import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { MapPin, Phone, Instagram, Clock, ExternalLink, Menu as MenuIcon, X, ChevronDown, Star, Award, Heart } from 'lucide-react'; export default function ChocolateTelloWebsite() { const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false); const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState('home'); const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [smartCTA, setSmartCTA] = useState('order'); const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState('crepes'); useEffect(() => { const handleScroll = () => { const scrollY = window.scrollY; setScrolled(scrollY > 50); // Smart CTA logic based on scroll depth const scrollPercent = (scrollY / (document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight)) * 100; if (scrollPercent < 25) setSmartCTA('order'); else if (scrollPercent < 50) setSmartCTA('menu'); else if (scrollPercent < 75) setSmartCTA('contact'); else setSmartCTA('order'); // Section highlighting const sections = ['home', 'menu', 'about', 'events', 'gallery', 'contact']; for (const section of sections) { const element = document.getElementById(section); if (element) { const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect(); if (rect.top <= 100 && rect.bottom >= 100) { setActiveSection(section); break; } } } }; window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); }, []); const scrollToSection = (id) => { const element = document.getElementById(id); if (element) { element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); setMobileMenuOpen(false); } }; const hours = [ { day: 'Tisdag', time: '12:00 - 23:30' }, { day: 'Onsdag', time: '12:00 - 23:30' }, { day: 'Torsdag', time: '12:00 - 23:30' }, { day: 'Fredag', time: '12:00 - 04:00' }, { day: 'Lördag', time: '12:00 - 04:00' }, { day: 'Söndag', time: '12:00 - 23:30' }, { day: 'Måndag', time: '12:00 - 23:30' }, ]; const getMenuItems = () => { const menuData = { crepes: [ { name: 'Pannkakor 10 st', price: '140 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Crepes', price: '140 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Våfflor', price: '140 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Pannkakor 15 st', price: '160 kr' }, ], gelato: [ { name: 'Gelato 1 Kula', price: '42.90 kr' }, { name: 'Gelato 2 Kulor', price: '53.90 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Gelato 3 Kulor', price: '64.90 kr' }, ], bowls: [ { name: 'Sweet Bowl', price: '165 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Spaghetti', price: '165 kr' }, ], family: [ { name: 'Familjetallrik', price: '650 kr', popular: true, desc: 'Perfekt för hela familjen' }, ], desserts: [ { name: 'Rulle med äkta grädde och pistagesås', price: '180 kr', popular: true }, ], salads: [ { name: 'Diet Fruktsallad', price: '174.90 kr' }, { name: 'Lyxig Fruktsallad med Glass och Grädde', price: '185.90 kr', popular: true }, ], cocktails: [ { name: 'Tropisk Favorit Cocktail', price: '97.90 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Avokado Mjukhet Cocktail', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Strawberry Dream Cocktail', price: '97.90 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Molnbanan Cocktail', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Banan och Nutella Cocktail', price: '97.90 kr' }, ], shakes: [ { name: 'Milkshake Oreo', price: '97.90 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Milkshake Lotus Karamell', price: '97.90 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Milkshake Jordgubbskräm', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Milkshake Choklad', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Milkshake Vanilj', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Milkshake Pistage', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Milkshake Blåbär', price: '97.90 kr' }, ], hot: [ { name: 'Espresso', price: '42.90 kr' }, { name: 'Dubbel Espresso', price: '49.50 kr' }, { name: 'Americano', price: '46.20 kr' }, { name: 'Cappuccino', price: '60.50 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Te', price: '42.90 kr' }, { name: 'Latte', price: '60.50 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Islatte', price: '60.50 kr' }, ], juice: [ { name: 'Vattenmelonjuice', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Citron- och Jordgubbsjuice med Mynta', price: '97.90 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Mangojuice', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Ananasjuice', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Kiwi- och Citronjuice', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Kiwi Juice', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Färskpressad Apelsinjuice', price: '97.90 kr', popular: true }, { name: 'Mango och Passionsfrukt Juice', price: '97.90 kr' }, { name: 'Blåbärjuice', price: '97.90 kr' }, ], cold: [ { name: 'Kejsaren', price: '198 kr', popular: true, desc: 'Vår signatur-drink' }, ], }; return menuData[activeCategory] || []; }; const testimonials = [ { name: 'Emma L.', text: 'Bästa våfflorna i Stockholm! Kommer tillbaka varje vecka.', rating: 5 }, { name: 'Marcus A.', text: 'Otrolig kvalitet och service. Rekommenderas varmt!', rating: 5 }, { name: 'Sofia K.', text: 'Perfekt efter en kväll ute. Öppettiderna är guld värt.', rating: 5 }, ]; const galleryImages = [ { url: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAAAQABAAD/2wBDAAUDBAQEAwUEBAQFBQUGBwwIBwcHBw8LCwkMEQ8SEhEPERETFhwXExQaFRERGCEYGh0dHx8fExciJCIeJBweHx7/2wBDAQUFBQcGBw4ICA4eFBEUHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh7/wAARCAJYAlgDASIAAhEBAxEB/8QAHQAAAgIDAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAQIAAwQFBgcICf/EAEYQAAEDAwIEBAMGBQIGAQIGAwECAxEABCESMQVBUWEGEyJxMoGRBxShscHRI0JS4fAVYggkM3KC8UNTkhYlNGNzorIXwv/EABsBAAIDAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABAgMEBQYH/8QANREAAgIBAgMFBwMFAQEBAQAAAAECAxEEIRIxQQUTIlFhMnGBkaGx8BTB0QYVQuHxMyM0Uv/aAAwDAQACEQMRAD8A+TDj3HQUNjAVqFNKjGdR/OlGf2rURJOCSMVD2zHaoCdsEDrUIG9AE3JxmoBymociZ2ziolWZORQATBHOaByRJkdKhMp2+tSDzzSAcRG/cxTr1JXM78+opFgiSZpgCSAsYI60AIZE4oFMCcwc00ZAJnG5oRKSeQpgAHvimznURQIAODg4qZA5wedABws4AmdtqdMkHUCR+VIiQNUY70VagMK33zSAAVGZ57VJCjsRQAgRjrtQifemAcqxt8qAkK22qGZn9akGJmKAGB3Bz1k0Z3Kue01CCqcmTtiokKmFYEUgARzxnvVjakaYUJI5il0gjoOtKpKhAgUAWrIPq3BqtSSnJyD3o407b/hRBBTBmDsaAK1AnIxUgkYMcvnVoCCD1A32qrvNABlQMYyPrQKhORg86KRBgQR3qKAKowPnTAIPIc6BEE7SfwoJO459aMifwNAEMx29qKIiTjlRITpMEz7UAk8/agYwI1KxA3xSq/yakSYAmgUQfizvQAUQDiflU0HXnemSlJbBBzzxmrlBIwlRMbYpZEVpEYn1flTTgAwJxQWCAJgHeaWdUDpzHOgYClU8onPeljMAE9BNOZkCYzGKZISY0qKehNAhmkYM+wimcb1IlSth059KIbmVayDypEKUshEFSxgAZn2FLJJIrKcAgEDao7ONMg8621lwS/uUkqSGUgZ1iVAf9orLc4dwiyg31y684BPlpOfaB+pqp6iCeFu/Q6NfZGplDvJrgj5yeP8Af0OdGpSgBJJO1ZLvDbpDPnPNBpvkpagCflvWVc3SfU1Y2yLVv+rdZHuK17ynFqOtS1q2BUSo1NOT9CicKKspvifpsvqsv6ASklYSkDPOr/LaaaPmEuOTGhJwO5NVQjTAI1dTViLZ9+UMIU4ZzpGKcn5lNSbeIxy/zoZSeL3Gltq3SllCUwAgfvVB8991JW8T5ioKnFwJ5zWyseAunNw4GlGMJEkT+RrbscKtmmgjyg96ZlZmIMwB3NZJX1V+yehp7K1+rSdzaXq/2XL5GptuCreSQwlaUlX/AFFjJEchua39jZMWwloBSkoA1KOT3q9enVBJSpW+djE7Un3qUBtaAmYTgxz71jnbZYj0ml0Ok0cspb+f5y+/qXOKwkEcpPY1FqlOFYqtp1pby2goT0BnnVr2NgqBvHLtVDTOxGyLWUxR8QI+eaYhYTkGOg5ikQSuNERA5zvzq06oSlA2GcVEsUs7oRMkQMid6dQI04GoCTGaU7FIkjfeiojVuI96CRCrUMgkzGomghSgITyAiikkCJ75qNhJVMgRvMjFABEEEEgCZ96icxuBOIyYqEkqMJAHL/3RBAbJJ3jrt70BjBFE6lGeUnvUEhuCNQ/LvQKylR0ICgNhGfn2ppEFIJE5PvQJbhUowokCCMmYNBOlRBTOd5M/WoUwjbnJ5kQaBUDqCgASJPPHKgAPmFq0pUOuImlyAFRIIgAnlTrUIIUS {/* About Section */}
Vår Historia

Passion För Perfektion

Sedan starten har Chocolate Tello varit synonymt med kvalitet och innovation i Stockholm. Vi kombinerar traditionella belgiska recept med moderna smaker för att skapa oförglömliga upplevelser.

Varje våffla är handgjord med premium ingredienser och serveras med kärlek. Vårt team är dedikerat till att leverera inte bara mat, utan minnen.

5★
Betyg
1000+
Nöjda Kunder
Premium Kvalitet
Alltid färska ingredienser
